raw_text:
Neuralflow Labs

Democratizing AI through scalable, interpretable machine learning solutions

INTERN MACHINE LEARNING ENGINEER

San Francisco, CA (Remote-friendly) · Internship · $28-32/hour

Join Neuralflow Labs as a Machine Learning Engineer Intern and gain hands-on experience building

and deploying ML models in a collaborative, learning-focused environment. You'll work alongside

senior ML engineers on real-world projects, contributing to feature engineering, model

experimentation, and pipeline development. This is an excellent opportunity to translate coursework

into practical experience and grow your technical skills in a rapidly evolving field.

ABOUT US

Neuralflow Labs is a fast-growing AI/ML startup founded in 2021, focusing on building production-

grade machine learning systems for enterprises. We specialize in helping companies implement end-

to-end ML pipelines, from data ingestion and feature engineering to model training and deployment.
Our mission is to make enterprise-grade AI accessible to organizations of all sizes through intuitive

tools and best practices.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Assist in preprocessing and cleaning datasets for ML model training under senior engineer
guidance

Implement and experiment with ML models using PyTorch and TensorFlow, comparing
architectures and hyperparameters

Help track experiments and model metrics using MLflow, learning best practices for
reproducibility and versioning

Support feature engineering and feature store integration using Delta Lake or similar platforms
to understand data pipeline architecture

Deploy trained models to AWS SageMaker or Google Vertex AI with mentorship, focusing on
containerization and API development

Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving team documentation and ML best
practices

Collaborate with data engineering and product teams to understand real-world ML

requirements and constraints

Write clean, well-tested Python code following the team's coding standards and contribute to
internal ML libraries

Document experimental results and present findings to the team in weekly learning sessions

REQUIRED

 Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or

related field, or recent graduate (within 6 months)

Foundational knowledge of machine learning concepts (supervised/unsupervised learning,

model evaluation, overfitting)

Proficiency in Python and experience with data manipulation libraries (NumPy, Pandas)

Basic understanding of deep learning frameworks; exposure to PyTorch or TensorFlow through

coursework or personal projects

Strong problem-solving skills and curiosity about how ML systems work in production

NICE TO HAVE

Experience with version control systems (Git) and collaborative development workflows

Familiarity with Docker or basic containerization concepts

Previous experience with cloud platforms (AWS or Google Cloud) or internships in related

fields

Portfolio or GitHub repositories showcasing ML projects or data science work

TECH STACK

Python   PyTorch   TensorFlow   Keras   MLflow   AWS SageMaker

  Google Vertex AI

  Databricks Delta Lake

Docker

  scikit-learn

BENEFITS

Competitive hourly rate plus performance bonus potential

Flexible, remote-friendly work environment with occasional in-office collaboration

Mentorship from experienced ML engineers with exposure to industry best practices

Professional development budget for courses, conferences, or certifications

Free access to internal ML tools and cloud computing resources for learning

Casual work culture with regular team social events and learning lunches

Potential for return offer conversion to full-time role based on performance

HOW TO APPLY

Submit your resume, a brief cover letter, and a link to your GitHub profile or portfolio (if available) to
careers@neuralflowtlabs.com with the subject line 'ML Intern Application'. Alternatively, apply through
our careers page at www.neuralflowtlabs.com/careers. Please include a short note (1-2 sentences)
about why you're interested in machine learning and what you hope to learn during the internship.
Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.
